title: Ryanair to build new hangar at Prestwick Airport in £40m investment

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Ryanair to build new hangar at Prestwick Airport in £40m investment. Prestwick Airport(Lennystan, Shutterstock) RYANAIR has announced a £40 million expansion of its maintenance facility at Prestwick Airport.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Ryanair to build new hangar at Prestwick Airport in £40m investment
